args: groupnorm_sc_N_1_HW_C — add float32 and bfloat8_b to SUPPORTED dtype and affine_dtype, expose compute_kernel_config, set intermediate CB precision

plan: dtype axes via dtype-derived CB formats (helpers carry reconfig, zero compute changes); compute_kernel_config exposed with prior defaults; intermediates fp32 iff fp32_dest_acc_en or fp32 input else bf16; no UnpackToDestFp32 (all intermediates FPU-consumed); multicore: unit=(n,g) group, split N*G via split_work_to_cores, per-core start/count rt args in all three kernels

plan: Pass1 mean stays REDUCE_SCALAR over zero-padded tiles with logical 1/sqrt(HW*Cg) scaler; pass2/pass3 insert FPU mask-mul on tail rows/cols using reader-generated bf16 mask rows (REDUCE_SCALAR has no partial-scaler support per /partial-scaler-reduce). G==1 reclassified as groups_alignment=aligned (single group cannot straddle tiles).

detail: hw_tail 17x64 all-ones PASSES; c_tail 64x17 all-ones returns constant 0.7773 (expected 0). Mean must deviate from 1 -> pass1 or mask interaction suspect.

actual: mean=0.996094 (bf16 scaler rounding for N=1088), var=1.52e-5=(1-mean)^2, rstd~200 -> out=0.7773
conclusion: masking correct; all-ones is degenerate (var=0 amplifies bf16 mean rounding by rstd). Switch debug test to amplification-aware bound; rely on randn tests.

detail: all randn tail tests pass dev+prod: hw/c/both tails, G>1 hw tails, affine variants, fp32/bf8b, RM input, straddle rejections. rel_rms 0.002-0.015. All-ones debug case was degenerate (var=0 amplifies bf16 scaler rounding x rstd~316), not a masking bug.
6/6 with amplification-aware all-ones bound + constantness check; DPRINT removed from compute kernel
477 passed in 321s; non-regression green
exit 143 SIGTERM at 600s bash limit; not a test failure - need sharded runs
434 pass / 6 fail / 424 skip. All 6 are c_non_aligned FLOAT32+bf8b-gamma precision near-misses (rms 0.0100-0.0105 vs 0.01, pcc 0.99994+).

Pass-3 mask mul adds extra TF32 rounding on valid fp32 values every row; pass-3 mask only matters for bf8b output (block exponents). Gate pass-3 masking on output dtype == bf8b; pass-2 masking unchanged (correctness).
still 6 failed after pass-3 mask gating; need rms deltas

rms unchanged after pass-3 gate -> mask not the source. Tail N=1088 non-pow2 -> bf16 scaler rounds at 2^-9 rel (DPRINT mean 0.996). Aligned N is pow2 -> exact scaler. Lever: scaler CB Float32 when stats fp32.
fp32 scaler CB: 6 -> 2 failures

floor_rms=0.01064 (bf8b gamma quantization alone, perfect math) > target 0.01; op_rms=0.01056 (below floor); op_vs_floor=0.00092. Cell irreducible with seed gamma on 17 channels; leave failing per precision-near-miss protocol.
